Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1003 "MAGICMADNESS-C100-1003" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c100 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Magic Madness.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C100 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts. 2. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $C140 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. 3. Re-enables raster interrupts and timer NMIs. 4. And finally jumps to the entry point at $1003 (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack being cleared).
